title.en: What to say if you see someone afflicted by misfortune

items.arabicText: ((الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِي عَافَانِي مِمَّا ابْتَلاَكَ بِهِ، وَفَضَّلَنِي عَلَى كَثِيرٍ مِمَّنْ خَلَقَ تَفْضِيلاً)).

translations.en: (All praise is for Allah Who saved me from that which He tested you with and Who most certainly favoured me over much of His creation.)
